career_paths.title: Software Engineer
career_paths.description: I design and develop efficient, reliable computer hardware like processors, circuit boards, and memory devices, for example, building the motherboard for a gaming PC.

career_paths.title: Hardware Engineer
career_paths.description: I design and develop efficient, reliable computer hardware like processors, circuit boards, and memory devices, for example, building the motherboard for a gaming PC.

career_paths.title: Embedded Systems Engineer
career_paths.description: I create software that runs on real-time hardware devices like IoT gadgets or automotive systems, such as programming a smart thermostat.

career_paths.title: Network Engineer / Systems Administrator
career_paths.description: I manage computer networks and servers, ensuring secure, uninterrupted connectivity, like maintaining corporate Wi-Fi and servers.

career_paths.title: Cybersecurity Analyst / Engineer
career_paths.description: I protect systems and networks from evolving cyber threats, such as detecting and stopping ransomware attacks.

career_paths.title: AI / Machine Learning Engineer
career_paths.description: I develop intelligent, data-driven algorithms, such as recommendation systems for e-commerce platforms.

career_paths.title: Data Analyst / Engineer
career_paths.description: I collect and analyze data to produce meaningful insights, like studying customer behavior to improve sales.

career_paths.title: Robotics Engineer
career_paths.description: I design and program robots for precision tasks, such as a robotic arm for assembling electronics.

career_paths.title: Firmware Engineer
career_paths.description: I write low-level, hardware-aware software that directly interfaces with devices, like firmware for smart wearables.
